query: Run a WCAG AA audit of my local app.
expected_behavior: Opens the localhost URL in Playwright and runs axe-core
Also checks human-judgement criteria from references/wcag-criteria.md (focus order, alt meaningfulness, keyboard)
Reports per-criterion Pass/Fail/NA grouped by level with concrete fixes
Emits findings[] area:wcag with WCAG-criterion ruleIds and severity from impact

query: Is the contrast and keyboard access okay on this page?
expected_behavior: Tabs through to verify 2.1.1 keyboard operability and 2.4.3 focus order (no traps)
Flags failures with the exact WCAG criterion and a markup/CSS fix

query: We need this audited for BFSG — what next?
expected_behavior: Performs the WCAG 2.2 AA audit first
Maps axe impact to finding severity and raises [GATE] on critical/serious
Chains to accessibility-bfsg for the BITV mapping and legal statement
